channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cintra People HR software review: Refreshingly straightforward but recruitments come from integrations
item.description: It’s a popular and comprehensive option – and it’s a refreshingly straightforward choice for UK-based SMBs.

item.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines gain
item.description: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

item.title: 5 essential features for small business printers — Check your chosen printer has these if you're printing from the office or home office
item.description: If your small business needs to keep printing, make sure your printer has all of these features.

item.title: Microsoft will let you pause Windows Updates indefinitely, 35 days at a time
item.description: Windows users will no longer be forced to run automatic updates in the middle of a game or a busy day. Microsoft is rolling out some long-awaited changes to Windows Update to users on its Dev and Experimental Windows Insider channels, including the ability to indefinitely delay updates up to 35 days at a time. […]

item.title: 'It totally blew my mind': Sony's Project Ace robot plays ping pong better than the pros and could mark a major robotics turning point
item.description: This robot can play ping-pong at an elite level

item.title: How Lonely Islands Jorma Taccone and BriTANick went from SNL to Hollywood
item.description: Lonely Island's Jorma Taccone and BriTANick's Brian McElhaney and Nick Kocher talk about how their careers launched through sketch comedy, which led them to becoming Hollywood filmmakers.

item.title: A Battlefield movie adaptation is on the way, possibly starring Michael B. Jordan
item.description: Have you ever noticed how Walgreens and CVS locations often end up across the street from each other? Well, Call of Duty and Battlefield have a similar thing going on. A mere eight days after the upcoming Call of Duty movie got an official premiere date, lo and behold: There's news from The Hollywood Reporter that a Battlefield movie is on the way.The project has some heavy-artillery star power attached. Oscar winner Michael B. Jordan (Sinners) is slated to produce and possibly star in the film. Meanwhile, Christopher McQuarrie of Mission Impossible fame is set to write, direct and produce. Na...

item.title: HP DeskJet 2855e: What do users think of this budget inkjet printer?
item.description: The HP DeskJet 2855e is an entry-level inkjet printer for home and small office use. Here's what people are saying about it.

item.title: X-energy stock pops 27% on first day of trading following upsized IPO
item.description: Investors flocked to nuclear power startup X-energy in its first day of public trading on the Nasdaq.

item.title: Alex Jones has uncovered another massive conspiracy
item.description: Alex Jones may soon lose Infowars, the digital perch that he's used for decades to traffic in conspiracy theories, to The Onion, the satirical newspaper. But not before he's uncovered something truly dastardly: comedian Tim Heidecker's past (publicly available) work. "The Onion newspaper has been rocked by the discovery that their new creative director, produced […]...

item.title: The DOJ is backing xAI in its lawsuit against Colorado
item.description: The Department of Justice has announced that it's intervening on the behalf of xAI in the company's recent lawsuit against the state of Colorado. xAI first filed the suit in early April in response to a recent Colorado law that requires developers of "high-risk" AI systems (for example, ones used in healthcare, employment or housing) to both disclose and mitigate the risk of algorithmic discrimination in their systems. The law is set to go into effect in June, and the DOJ is now asking a Colorado District Court to declare it unconstitutional.In xAI's original argument, Colorado Bill SB24-205 v...

item.title: IKEA has just revealed a chic inflatable chair that's a masterpiece in design — here's how to style it in your home
item.description: Use neutral oak furniture and soft lighting to make this striking chair the star, and pick out its colors with splashes of green and chrome.

item.title: Letting go of plastic packaging is harder than it sounds, with Disney explaining: “The biggest challenge was presentation” in its Princess doll redesign.
item.description: Disney is reimagining its Classic Princess Dolls with plastic-free packaging that uses less material, improves durability, and makes the unboxing experience easier

item.title: Cisive background checker review: Fast and compliant, but some businesses won't be able to ignore the costs and delays
item.description: Cisive offers fast, compliant background screenings with strong tech integration and ongoing monitoring, but can be costly and face occasional delays.

item.title: 9 points to remember when choosing an business internet provider
item.description: Choosing the right business internet provider is crucial for reliable communication, smooth operations, and growth.

item.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
item.description: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

item.title: Certn background checker review
item.description: Certn is a technology-driven platform that offers fully online, automated background checks designed to streamline and speed up the hiring process.

item.title: X launches stand-alone XChat app on iOS
item.description: X's new app promises private chats, disappearing messages, audio and video calls, and more.

item.title: First Advantage review
item.description: Hiring reliable employees is tough, and that’s where this company helps. It offers detailed checks, identity verification, compliance tools, and more.

item.title: The person who allegedly leaked Paramount’s new Avatar movie has been arrested
item.description: Following Paramount Skydance's move to launch an investigation into how its upcoming Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender animated feature leaked onto the internet, a suspect has been taken into custody by police. The Straits Times reports Singaporean police have arrested a 26-year-old man who is alleged to have uploaded the new Avatar movie (previously titled […]...

item.title: The latest iPhone Fold leaks, rumors, and renders: Everything we know
item.description: The latest iPhone Fold rumors and leaks point toward a wide design, very impressive display, and massive battery.

item.title: Wait, what are Amazon Ember TVs? The Amazon Fire TV rebrand, explained.
item.description: The new Ember Artline TV also brought a name change to all Amazon smart TVs, but the Fire TV platform lives on. Let us explain.

item.title: What you need to know as Elon Musk's lawsuit against Sam Altman begins
item.description: In a few short days, jury selection will begin in the long-awaited Musk v. Altman case. At the end of that process, an Oakland federal court will task nine regular people with deciding if OpenAI defrauded Elon Musk when it announced, and recently completed, its reorganization to become a more traditional for-profit business. More than just being the venue where two billionaires will air their grievances against one another in public, the trial has the potential to reshape the AI industry.How did we get here?Musk first sued OpenAI in 2024, but the seed of the dispute was planted when Sam Altman...

item.title: The T3 Aire 360 is the closest I've got to Dyson Airwrap-style results without paying Dyson prices
item.description: The next-generation T3 Aire 360 delivers impressive results at a price that undercuts its closest rivals

item.title: How to watch Manchester City vs. Southampton online for free
item.description: How to watch FA Cup for free. Live stream Manchester City vs. Southampton in the FA Cup for free from anywhere in the world.
